name: Winky Dink M&adieresis;rzen
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 7 lbs of Malt Extract Syrup-Light with 1.5 gallons of cold water.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil.
3. Remove the grains from the boiling liquid when it starts to bubble.
4. Add 1/2 lb of crystal malt and 1/2 cup of chocolate malt to the boiling extract.
5. Stir in 2 ozs of Hallertauer hops, which will be used during the boil.
6. Continue boiling for 45-60 minutes.
7. During the last 2-5 minutes of boiling, add the remaining 1/2 oz of Hallertauer hops as finishing hops.
8. Sparge the grains and cool the mixture to room temperature.
9. Pitch the lager yeast into the cooled liquid.
10. Bottle when ready.
